title: start from june till now, only have 5 plastic balls

replies.msg: hong kong people talk 5 plastic balls miss one cannot from june, very simple and no change. But Ms Lam no answer, now police shoot, everyone broken things, hong kong still safe? I think no. Every country warning to Hong Kong, must and now!!

To recap the 5 plastic balls for outsider no understand what we ask for since June:
1. Stop send to China rule
2. Stop saying protest is riot
3. Stop chargeing protesting human

5. Choose two president now!

it is simple and no change till now
